list.title: Devices
list.description: Connect and manage your WhatsApp devices.

empty.title: No devices yet
empty.description: Add your first device to connect a WhatsApp number.

noResults.title: No results
noResults.description: No device matches your search or filter.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete device
deleteConfirm.description: The device will be disconnected and permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.

secret.title: Save the webhook secret
secret.warning: This secret signs your webhooks and is shown only once. Save it now — it won't be shown again.
secret.label: Webhook secret

qr.title: Connect device
qr.scan: Open WhatsApp > Linked devices > Link a device and scan the code.
qr.error: Couldn't start the connection. Please try again.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Configure one URL per event to receive the device's notifications.
webhooks.onReceiveDormant: Stored, but not yet triggered in this version.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete device
deleteConfirm.description: The device will be disconnected and permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
